notes: agy has NEITHER a native self-prompting loop NOR a surfaced per-turn iteration cap (MaxIterations is an internal symbol with no user-facing cap-hit message; the only limit sentence is a token budget). The loop is INTERNAL to one user turn: one seeded explicitly-bounded multi-step prompt ('do exactly 2 steps then STOP') drives the agent's OWN sequential run_command cycles with no user prompts between iterations. Single-birth adapter (transcript-first, one <conv-id>). Mid-turn planner-with-tool → assistant_message and result → function_call_output are non-settling, so the daemon sees ONE continuous working span across all internal iterations, and the cap-hit lands as a SINGLE terminal working→ready at the terminal empty PLANNER_RESPONSE. The DISTINGUISHING assertion vs the autonomous-loop sibling is the TERMINAL IDLE DWELL: after that terminal working→ready the session must settle to ready and DWELL there with NO further state_transition to working — proving the loop stopped cleanly at its self-imposed limit and did not stick in working or spuriously re-prompt. No waiting under auto-approve. Tokens/cost not in the JSONL → observations assert tokens_nonzero:false, cost_nonzero:false; model omitted (provisional). INTERACTIVE driver (REPL held open through the dwell). driver=gap:wait_turn — record ports wait_turn (must NOT return on a mid-turn cycle) + the launch_repl session-resolution SEAM first.

text: antigravity session (<conv-id>) appears in ready when transcript.jsonl is written
Spec: ready → working at loop start — the one seeded explicitly-bounded multi-step prompt drives the agent into its autonomous internal loop

Spec: agent reaches its (self-imposed) limit, emits a terminal turn signal, stops; working → ready. One continuous working span across >=2 internal tool cycles (assistant_message + function_call_output), flipping to ready exactly once at the terminal empty PLANNER_RESPONSE. No waiting (auto-approve).

Spec: state reaches ready even though the agent didn't fully succeed; does not stick in working. The session DWELLS in ready for >=7s of trailing idle with NO further working transition (no stuck-working, no spurious post-limit re-prompt) and never any waiting. Final state: ready.
